name: CARE Hello
description: Sample CARE plugin used to exercise the App Store discovery and setup flow.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from apps/care_hello_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

mandatory.label: API base URL
mandatory.description: Server-side API base URL used for the health check before enabling the plug.

defaults.label: Greeting
defaults.description: Sample configuration value passed into the plugin.

optional.label: Workspace
optional.description: Optional logical workspace name sent to the plugin configuration.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
rawSetup.description: Start with a minimal plug_config and edit it directly.
